title: Resinous Crunchy British Seeds Sunday Roast
description: A show-off British dish featuring sesame, pumpkin, and sunflower seeds, with a spicy kick from nuka-pickle. Perfect for a special occasion or ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly gathering.

ingredients.name: Pumpkin seeds
ingredients.notes: Toasted in a 350F oven for 10 minutes.

ingredients.name: Sunflower seeds
ingredients.notes: Toasted in a 350F oven for 10 minutes.

instructions: In a large bowl, toss together pumpkin seeds, sesame seeds, and sunflower seeds. Roast in the oven for 10 minutes, or until lightly toasted.

In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add the carrot and cook for 5 minutes, or until tender. Add the Brussels sprouts and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until tender.

In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil. Add the red onion and cook for 3 minutes, or until softened. Add the garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute, or until fragrant.
Add the nuka-pickle, rosemary, salt, black pepper, and thyme to the skillet. Stir to combine.
To assemble the roast, place the roasted seeds in the bottom of a large roasting pan. Add the cooked vegetables on top of the seeds.
Roast in the oven for 20 minutes, or until the seeds are lightly browned and the vegetables are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with additional rosemary if desired.
Let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Cut into 8 equal portions and serve.
Store leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days or freeze for up to 2 months.
Reheat in the oven or microwave until hot and steaming hot.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as roasted potatoes or a side salad.
This dish is perfect for a special occasion or ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly gathering.
It's also a great way to get your daily dose of healthy fats and protein.
This recipe serves 8 people and takes 45 minutes to prepare and cook.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
